http://secondphoneapps.com/privacy_policy.html

We take privacy seriously. We know your device has personally identifying information, and we do not want it.
 
We collect and use information for improving features, advertising and marketing purposes.
 
This app, like many others, can collect a lot of personal information from your device.
 
We keep your identity anonymous and use any anonymous personal information for product development, advertising and marketing purposes. We also sell similar anonymous data to partners and affiliates.
 
We do not store personally identifiying information off of your phone unless you explicitly grant permission and would expect it. (For example, to back up data or recover a password, if we offer the option.)
 
To use this app, you agree to allow us to collect and use data from your device (please indicate below). We do not have an opt-out option. Please see our privacy policy located on our website indicated above for details.
